rationale: The citing note explicitly says it "extends prior research on rating formats" and "qualifies recent claims" about rating veridicality, which aligns closely with the cited paper’s core finding that graphical rating displays systematically bias perception and judgment. Both papers study platform-controlled online rating-display formats and perception biases, suggesting a likely substantive conceptual link rather than a incidental mention. The reference is also a direct DOI match (10.1177/00222437231179186).
